mission.title: litellm: [Bug]: RuntimeError: Queue is bound to a different event loop with pytest parameterized async tests in CI environments
mission.description: [Bug]: RuntimeError: Queue is bound to a different event loop with pytest parameterized async tests in CI environments. Users encounter: "asyncio:Task exception was never".

steps.title: Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `asyncio:Task exception was never retrieved`

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### What happened?

**Title**: LiteLLM LoggingWorker causes event loop binding errors with pytest parameterized async tests

**Summary**: When running pytest parameterized tests that call `litellm.acompletion()` multiple times with different

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: RuntimeError: Queue is bound to a different event…
steps.description:
- `_ensure_queue()`: Before dropping old task references, call `.exception()` on done tasks to mark their exceptions as retrieved, preventing GC warnings.
- `_worker_loop()`: Add `except RuntimeError` handler for the "bound to a different event loop" error, exiting the loop gracefully instead of
```yaml
ERROR:asyncio:Task exception was never retrieved
future: <Task finished name='Task-58' coro=<LoggingWorker._worker_loop() done, defined at /home/runner/work/eval/eval/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_worker.py:43> exception=RuntimeError('<Queue at 0x7f136d61f190 maxsize=50000> is bound to a different event loop')>
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/runner/work/eval/eval/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_worker.py", line 51, in _worker_loop
    coroutine = await self._queue.get()
                ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: RuntimeError: Queue is bound to a… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `asyncio:Task exception was never retrieved` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
- `_ensure_queue()`: Before dropping old task references, call `.exception()` on done tasks to mark their exceptions as retrieved, preventing GC warnings.
- `_worker_loop()`: Add `except RuntimeError` handler for the "bound to a different event loop" error, exiting the loop gracefully instead of leaving an unhandled exception.
codeSnippets:
ERROR:asyncio:Task exception was never retrieved
future: <Task finished name='Task-58' coro=<LoggingWorker._worker_loop() done, defined at /home/runner/work/eval/eval/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_worker.py:43> exception=RuntimeError('<Queue at 0x7f136d61f190 maxsize=50000> is bound to a different event loop')>
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/runner/work/eval/eval/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_worker.py", line 51, in _worker_loop
    coroutine = await self._queue.get()
                ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.13/x64/lib/python3.11/asyncio/queues.py", line 155, in get
    getter = self._get_loop().create_future()
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/opt/

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
